verdict.summary: The round-2 major finding is resolved. route-resolve now rejects empty and unconfigured single-role labels before any security, role, or default routing, matching CLAIM-side ordering and preventing permissive fallback. dispatch-plan catches the shared fail-closed error per issue and emits no plan row, while preserving valid neighboring rows. The added resolver and planner self-tests directly assert raises/no-row behavior for empty and unknown roles, include security-label precedence cases, and would fail against the prior implementation, so they are non-vacuous. No new blocker, major, or other diff-scoped issue is supported by the changes.
